title: guettarda antirhoea
intro: Guettarda antirhoea, also known as the butterfly tree, is a flowering plant species in the Rubiaceae family, native to tropical and subtropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Guettarda antirhoea include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Guettarda antirhoea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
